Name: Time until SW-itial Reviewer Selection since the manuscript passed the Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: SW-Initial Reviewer Selection Cycle Time within the systematic review procedure
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and the end of the case

Name: Average duration of the SW-Initial Reviewer Selection activity compared to the SW-Checklist Completed activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and the end of the case

Name: Average time for SW-Initial Reviewer Selection compared to the average time for RW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and the end of the case

Name: Total time spent in SW-Initial Reviewer Selection relative to the total time spent in SW-AE Assign Reviewers within a case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time for SW-Initial Reviewer Selection compared to the minimum time for SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and the end of the case

Name: The ratio of average time for SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to the average time for the entire initial submission phase (from SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time difference between the SW-Initial Reviewer Selection duration and the SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week reminder interval
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week'

Name: Average time for SW-Initial Reviewer Selection grouped by case outcome (e.g., SW-EIC Reject, SW-EIC Major Revision)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'", 'end': '', 'aggregation': 'average', 'group_by': 'concept:name'}"

Name: Time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to the start of the major revision phase (SW–Major Revision due in 1 month)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'", 'end': "activity == 'SW–Major Revision due in 1 month'", 'aggregation': 'average'}"
